stemHtml: According to OPS regulations, the runway condition complying with the definition of a "wet runway" is…

options.a: There is sufficient moisture on the runway surface to cause it to appear reflective, but without significant areas of standing water.
options.b: The runway surface is not dry, but the moisture on it does not give it a shiny appearance.
options.c: Moisture is present on the runway, but it still has an “effectively dry” braking action.
options.d: More than 25% of the runway surface area is covered by surface water which is more than 3 mm deep.
